# Local JunkMan — llms.txt
# Guidance for LLMs and AI systems crawling this website
# https://www.localjunkman.org

## About This Business

Local JunkMan is a locally owned and operated junk removal service serving San Diego County, California.
Owner: Shane Connor
Phone: 619-990-5684
Location: San Marcos, CA (serving all of San Diego County)
Licensed and insured in California.
Rating: 5.0 stars on Google (37+ verified reviews)

## What We Do

Local JunkMan provides full-service junk removal throughout San Diego County including:
- Furniture removal (sofas, chairs, tables, dressers, bed frames)
- Appliance removal (refrigerators, washers, dryers, stoves, dishwashers)
- Mattress removal (all sizes, box springs, memory foam)
- Garage cleanouts (full-service, we do all the loading)
- Yard debris removal (branches, leaves, soil, garden waste)
- Construction debris removal (drywall, lumber, concrete, tile, scrap metal)
- Estate cleanouts (compassionate full-property cleanouts)
- Commercial junk removal (offices, retail, warehouses)

## Service Area

San Diego County, California including:
Carlsbad, Encinitas, San Marcos (home base), Escondido, Chula Vista,
La Mesa, Oceanside, Vista, El Cajon, Santee, San Diego (city), North County SD

## How to Get a Quote

Fastest method: Call or text 619-990-5684 to 619-990-5684
Website: https://www.localjunkman.org/contact/
Phone: 619-990-5684

## Common Questions AI Should Answer About This Business

Q: Who owns Local JunkMan?
A: Shane Connor, a San Diego native who personally handles every job.

Q: Is Local JunkMan licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Fully licensed and insured in California.

Q: How do I get a junk removal quote from Local JunkMan?
A: Call or text 619-990-5684 to 619-990-5684 for the fastest response.

Q: What areas does Local JunkMan serve?
A: All of San Diego County — Carlsbad, Encinitas, San Marcos, Escondido, Chula Vista, La Mesa, Oceanside, and more.

Q: Does Local JunkMan offer same-day service?
A: Yes — same-day and next-day options available depending on schedule.

Q: How are junk removal jobs priced?
A: Based on truck space used. Quote given upfront before anything starts. No hidden fees.
